Cert to Table

Study for the certifications hospitality runs on.
The problem

Every hospitality job needs a certification.

Required. Timed. And most people cram from a dull handbook. Alone.

Food safetyAlcohol AllergensWorkplace
How you learn

Learn it in
plain English.

Bite-size lessons with real-world examples, then flashcards to lock in the terms. Study at your own pace.

Quiz · Spaced repetition

Fifteen minutes
at a time.

Daily questions, chosen by spaced repetition. The readiness ring fills only when you've earned it.

Exam simulator

Practice the
real exam.

Full-length and timed, 80 questions. Walk away mid-section, then pick up exactly where you left off.

Study Radio

Study in
the zone.

Focus, Reggae, Zen Flute, Classical. Original study soundtracks built in, no extra subscription.

Offline-first

Study anywhere.
Even offline.

On the bus, on break, off the grid. Everything runs with zero signal.

Optional upgrade

Add an Optional Instructor.

Every guide has its own AI instructor who teaches each lesson out loud while the screen follows along.
